sourceSummary.oneLine: Part approval package for THERMAL PAD - 2, part number MC0-000048, applied to model HAD1717MC.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Used as supplier part approval documentation including revision history, raw material RoHS list, process flow, product inspection criteria, and inspection sheet.
keyPoints: Cover lists TO: H&Abyz, MODEL NO: HAD1717MC, PART NAME: THERMAL PAD - 2, PART NO: MC0-000048, DATE: 2019. 04. 23, FROM: ㈜휴켐.
Revision history records Rev. 0 on 2019. 04. 23 as 최초 제정.
Raw material RoHS list identifies Thermal Conductive Silicon Pad, maker Silicon valley, with SGS RoHS 성적서.
Product inspection criteria include appearance, dimensions/fit, thermal conductivity, and other mutually agreed criteria.
Inspection sheet includes 4M change notice language, C=0 Sampling, Incoming Standard, AQL items, and RoHS-related environmental inspection.

entities.evidence: Thermal Conductive Silicon Pad,,Silicon valley,SGS RoHS 성적서

concepts.evidence: 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

concepts.name: ASTM D 5470
concepts.evidence: ASTM D 5470 측정 방식의 시료 채취 방법에 따른다.

concepts.name: 4M Change Control
concepts.evidence: IF 4M CHANGED,RLEASE INFORM BUYER THE CHANGED ITEMS.

evidence.claim: The document is a part approval package.
The applied model is HAD1717MC.
The part name is THERMAL PAD - 2.
The part number is MC0-000048.
The document date is 2019. 04. 23.
The manufacturer listed on the cover is ㈜휴켐.
Revision 0 was initially established on 2019. 04. 23.
The raw material list includes Thermal Conductive Silicon Pad made by Silicon valley with an SGS RoHS report.
evidence.evidenceText: Thermal Conductive Silicon Pad,,Silicon valley,SGS RoHS 성적서

evidence.claim: The RoHS non-use certificate column names Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, and PBDE.
evidence.evidenceText: 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

evidence.claim: The inspection criteria apply to products produced by ㈜휴켐.
evidence.evidenceText: 본 사양은 ㈜휴켐 (이하 당사라 함)에서 생산되는 제품에 대해 적용한다.

evidence.claim: One production quantity by type is defined as one inspection lot.
One product is defined as one inspection unit.
Thermal conductivity inspection uses ASTM D 5470.
Sample collection follows the ASTM D 5470 measurement method.
evidence.evidenceText: ASTM D 5470 측정 방식의 시료 채취 방법에 따른다.

evidence.claim: Thermal conductivity judgment criterion is stated as at least 2.5 W/mk in the product inspection criteria.
Accepted lots are shipped after issuance of an inspection report.
evidence.evidenceText: 합격 처리된 LOT는 검사성적서 발행하여 출하한다.

evidence.claim: Rejected lots follow the internal nonconforming product handling procedure.
The inspection sheet asks suppliers to inform the buyer when 4M changes occur.
evidence.evidenceText: IF 4M CHANGED,RLEASE INFORM BUYER THE CHANGED ITEMS.

evidence.claim: The inspection method on the inspection sheet is C=0 Sampling.
The inspection standard on the inspection sheet is Incoming Standard.
The inspection sheet includes an environmental RoHS check with ICP validity period of one year.
evidence.evidenceText: 친환경 (Eoc),Not Rohs Spec Over (ICP Date Vaild Period : 1Year)

reviewFlags.reason: No government authority or jurisdiction is identified; the document appears to be supplier/customer part approval documentation.
Thermal conductivity evidence is conflicting: product inspection criteria state 2.5W/mk or higher, while the inspection sheet lists 열전도(W/m.k) 1.5.
OCR/source quality issues are present, including misspellings such as RLEASE, QUWSTIONS, Masure, Vaild, and conductiive.
Approval signature fields and later revision rows are present but not populated in the extracted text.

The process flow section contains separate metadata such as document number EQI-W18, date 2005.05.20, and part name EXHT-G1 that may belong to an embedded supplier process document rather than the 2019 part approval cover.
